mainEntity.name: What steps to hire an AEO agency in Phoenix?
mainEntity.text: What steps to hire an AEO agency in Phoenix?

acceptedAnswer.text: 1. Request free AI visibility audits. 2. Review case studies for attorney clients. 3. Check schema expertise and E-E-A-T strategies. 4. Compare contracts for Phoenix-local focus.[3]

suggestedAnswer.text: Start with consultations from agencies like those serving Phoenix, demanding proof of AI citations for law firms. Verify schema implementation and question-content success. Negotiate performance clauses; avoid generic SEO resellers. Local Phoenix knowledge prevents irrelevant optimizations that waste budget.[1][7]

name: How to Hire a Phoenix AEO Agency
